privacy.consolidate.done: Moved %lld transfers to your main address.
privacy.consolidate.hint: Sends the full balance from addresses 2–5 to your main address (address 1). No mixing with other wallets.
privacy.consolidate.title: Consolidate addresses
privacy.protection.item1: Receive: your main address by default — generate a new one on Receive for private incoming payments
privacy.protection.item2: Send opens with your default method — you can still change it on each transfer
privacy.protection.item3: Each new receive address is separate on-chain
privacy.protection.title: What's protecting you
privacy.receive.body: To receive USDT safely, open Receive and tap Generate another address. Each payment can use a new wallet address so senders cannot link them to your main balance.
privacy.receive.title: Secure receive
privacy.send.body: Tap a method to set the default for Send. The send fee is added to your transfer total and shown before you confirm.
privacy.send.title: Sending USDT
privacy.title: Wallet privacy
receive.choose.address.hint: Choose which address to receive USDT on. Your balance is the total across all five.
receive.delete.address.detail.footer: This balance will be removed from your balance list. Funds on this address stay on-chain.

send.deep.recovery.button: Move deep USDT to main address
send.deep.recovery.hint: Scans up to 1,024 old receive paths and sends any USDT found to your main address. The rest of the app only uses your five receive addresses.
send.deep.recovery.homeBanner: Deep recovery %1$s / %2$s — you can leave this screen
send.deep.recovery.rateLimited: Tron API rate limit reached. Wait about a minute and try again — the scan will resume more slowly.
send.deep.recovery.title: Deep address recovery
send.fee.label: Send fee
send.keep.open: Keep Mesh open until this finishes.
send.method.direct.detail: Sends from your main wallet. Fastest option.
send.method.private.detail: One intermediate wallet — recipient does not see your main address.
send.method.private.hops: 1 intermediate wallet — recipient does not see your main address
send.outcome.activity.hint: It may take a minute to appear in activity.
send.outcome.failed.fee.hint: No USDT left your wallet. The send fee is only charged after network preparation succeeds.
send.processing.activating.hint: First-time setup on Tron. Do not close Mesh until activation finishes.
send.processing.activating.keepOpen: Keep Mesh open while your address activates and your send starts.
send.processing.activating.subtitle: Mesh is activating your wallet on Tron before USDT can be sent. Please wait — this usually takes under a minute.
send.processing.background.safe: Mesh is sending on the network. You can close the app.
send.processing.hint.direct: Usually finishes in under a minute. You can close the app and check Activity.
send.processing.hint.private: Usually 2–3 minutes. You can close the app and check Activity.
send.processing.preparing.hint: Signing and registering with Mesh. Keep the app open briefly.
send.processing.subtitle: Your transfer was submitted.
send.review.prep.hint.activation: Mesh activates your send address on Tron so USDT can leave your wallet. This usually takes a few seconds.
send.review.prep.hint.fee: Signing the send fee so Mesh can finish your transfer in the background.
send.review.prep.hint.generic: Getting everything ready on Tron before you can swipe to send.
send.review.prep.hint.network: Mesh pays the Tron network fee for you — no TRX needed. This usually takes a few seconds.
send.review.private.deposit: Sending via secure deposit address when possible.
send.review.title: Review and send
send.title: Send USDT
send.warning.review: Check the address and amount. Crypto transfers cannot be reversed.
